style.note: One art direction for all 40 species so the collection reads as a single set. Only `subject` changes per animal; the prefix and suffix stay identical. Hand-painted Hearthstone/Warcraft game-art look — stylized and characterful, deliberately NOT a cutesy 3+ mascot style.
style.suffix: Hearthstone Warcraft game art style, bold exaggerated silhouette, painterly brush texture, mature vibrant palette, confident characterful pose, dramatic rim lighting, three-quarter view, full body, single character centered, consistent scale and camera, isolated on a plain neutral background, high detail, no text, no watermark, no border
